message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle awesome

actor "SecurityEngineer" as se
participant "EventBus" as eb
participant "Security Profile Manager" as spm
participant "Software Defined Infrastructure" as sdi

se -> spm: Monitor Security Profile
spm -> sdi: create (name: secProfileMSP,file: ./templates/secprofile.yml)
sdi --> eb: securityprofile.create
spm -> sdi: status (name: secProfileMSP)
sdi --> eb: securityprofile.status
@enduml
